label: Palestra / Centro Fitness

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Split contrast: January — Italian gym packed full, all spin bikes occupied, waitlist at reception, owner smiling. Then: April — same gym, half the equipment empty, owner alone. A post-it on the door about expired medical certificate. He calls a client. No answer. The client has already quit. Gym interior, natural light, time-lapse feeling between seasons, documentary style, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of paper attendance register. January page: full. March page: half empty. April: three quarters empty. Then: a shelf of plastic medical certificate folders. Hand pulls one out — expired since October last year. Documentary close-up, harsh gym fluorescent light mixed with daylight, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Cinquanta percento degli iscritti abbandona entro tre mesi. Non perche la palestra e brutta. Perche nessuno li ha cercati quando hanno saltato la prima settimana. E il certificato medico scaduto nel cassetto: senza quello valido, se cade qualcuno, sei tu il responsabile.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Empty gym equipment in afternoon light. Treadmills still, weights racked, no people. Just machines waiting. Cold fluorescent mixed with fading daylight, still camera, empty atmosphere, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same gym owner visible between equipment. Phone shows: 'Sara: iscrizione Giulia rinnovata. Certificato medico caricato. Prossima scadenza: marzo 2026.' The gym isn't January-full, but it's stable. February, March, April: stable. People working out in background, natural energy. Warm afternoon light, saturated warm tones, smooth tracking shot through gym, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, il promemoria abbonamento parte automatico. La scadenza del certificato medico, avviso trenta giorni prima. Il programma fedelta porta i tuoi clienti a tornare anche a febbraio, marzo, aprile. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial, bodybuilder competition
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, authentic Italian gym, natural light documentary, community fitness feel

music_gen_config.genre_hint: high energy motivational, electronic driving beats, powerful

prompts.tense: empty gym atmosphere, low electronic pulse, echoing silence, lonely treadmill, minor key, 90bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: motivational gym energy, driving electronic beats, confident synths, powerful comeback, major key, 120bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], il 50% di chi si iscrive a gennaio non c'e ad aprile.
Questo li riporta, o almeno avvisa prima che spariscano.
[VIDEO]
